mainEntity.name: What if a Chicago firm has negative AI referral mentions?
mainEntity.text: What if a Chicago firm has negative AI referral mentions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Address root via review responses, profile updates, and positive signals. AI adapts over 4-6 weeks with new data.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Identify via Perplexity searches. Respond publicly, add endorsements. Chicago ethics rules limit counters. Monitor; pivot to strengths. Negative sticks if unresolved—opponents amplify.[3]

name: Handle Negative AI Mentions in Chicago
description: Address root via review responses, profile updates, and positive signals. AI adapts over 4-6 weeks with new data.[3]
